cards.name: Holon Lake
cards.text: Each player's Pokemon that has δ on its card can use attacks on this card instead of their own. [C][C] Delta Draw: Count the number of Pokemon you have in play with δ on its card. Draw that many cards.

tests.description: Test that Holon Lake provides Delta Draw attack to delta Pokemon

tests.description: Test that Holon Lake counts as Holon Stadium for Delta Reactor
